calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-14-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Bruce Lubarsky, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.
9:20am: Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Charles T. Hammond, appears in Pro Per; No appearance by Respondent O'Grady Plumbing. Parties and witnesses previously sworn, testify in the narrative. William Harde appears as a witness for the Appellant. Case is dismissed by the Court due to non-appearance of the Respondent. Evidence is returned to the Appellant in open court.
9:25am Court adjourns.
9:30am
Bill O'Grady appears late, after matter has been submitted. He is advised to follow proper procedure if he wants to pursue the matter.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Judgment Entered
